description: A solar PV installation is reporting negative power values because the Current Transformer (CT) sensor was installed backwards. Correct the polarity for node 'garage_solar', input 'power' by inverting the values. Log the corrected real-time power to a PHPFina feed named 'solar_yield' (10s interval) and the cumulative energy to a PHPFina feed named 'solar_energy' (10s interval) using the 'Power to kWh' processor. The processing sequence must follow the order: Scale, Log, then Accumulate.
